title: Normalized Feedback Record
description: Canonical schema for customer feedback records ingested from any channel. All channel-specific data normalizes to this schema before enrichment and storage.

id.description: Unique feedback record identifier. Format: FB-NNNNNN (zero-padded to 6 digits). Assigned at normalization time.

channel_id.description: Reference to the channel configuration that produced this record. Format: CHANNEL-NNN.

channel_type.description: The type of channel this record came from.

source_id.description: The original identifier of this record in the source system. Used for deduplication and audit trail.

source_url.description: Direct URL to the original record in the source system, if accessible.

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was ingested into the pipeline.

feedback_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the customer provided this feedback. May differ from ingested_at for batch-ingested historical data.

content.description: The verbatim customer feedback text. This field is NEVER summarized or paraphrased — it preserves the exact customer words for quote attribution in Opportunity Briefs.
examples: The CSV export is completely broken for files over 5,000 rows. We literally cannot do our monthly analysis without this. Please fix ASAP.

id.description: Internal identifier for the author (may be hashed/anonymized depending on PII policy).

type.description: Classification of who provided the feedback.

anonymized.description: Whether PII in this record has been anonymized.

customer_metadata.description: Customer context enriched from CRM or source system. Used for RICE Reach estimation and segment filtering.

arr_band.description: Annual recurring revenue band. Used for ARR-weighted opportunity scoring.

tenure_months.description: How many months the customer has been a paying customer.

company_id.description: Internal company identifier (hashed if PII policy requires).

enrichment.description: AI-generated enrichment added by the Tagging Agent after normalization. Null until processing is complete.

sentiment_score.description: Continuous sentiment score: -1.0 = most negative, +1.0 = most positive.

themes.description: One or more theme labels from the hierarchical taxonomy in schemas/tagging-taxonomy.yaml.

entities.description: Named entities extracted from the feedback content.

urgency_level.description: Urgency classification based on language intensity signals.

urgency_signals.description: Specific phrases that triggered urgency classification.

ai_confidence.description: Confidence score for the enrichment classifications (0.0-1.0). Records below 0.60 should be flagged for human review.

enrichment_model.description: Model used for enrichment, for audit and reproducibility.

status.description: Processing status of this record. raw = just ingested; processed = enrichment complete; linked = associated with one or more OPP-NNN.

linked_opportunities.description: Opportunity Brief IDs (OPP-NNN) that reference this feedback record.

embedding.description: Vector embedding of the content field. Stored in the database vector column, not in the file representation. Null in file-based storage.
